name: Milky Fresh Taro
description: Fresh taro blended with creamy milk, naturally sweet and velvety smooth.

name: Roasted Oolong Milk Tea
description: Deep roasted oolong infused with silky milk, rich aroma with a toasty finish.

name: Strawberry Blush
description: Fresh strawberry purée with light cream foam, fruity and refreshing.

name: Choco Banana Brûlée Frost
description: Chocolate and ripe banana blended with milk, topped with brûlée cream frost.

name: Crème Brûlée Coffee
description: Bold coffee layered with caramelized brûlée cream, rich and indulgent.

name: Jasmine Matcha Cloud
description: Aromatic jasmine tea layered with smooth matcha cream cloud, light and floral.
